prompt: Help me plan my next four weeks as founder of Reveal.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Week1 profiles ship
nodes.details: Week 1: finish member profiles + authz slice; exit criteria = join→profile→home path works.

nodes.label: Week2 community feed
nodes.details: Week 2: community home route + empty/feed queries; acceptance includes empty-state contract.

nodes.label: Week3 study model
nodes.details: Week 3: study series schema + facilitator role; no gamification.

nodes.label: Week4 quiet inbox
nodes.details: Week 4: notification persistence + prefs (quiet defaults); realtime optional.

nodes.label: Decision dependencies
nodes.details: Paid-vs-free still open — do not block on entitlements enforcement this month.
